summary: The diff implements all seven requirements comprehensively. REQ-1 through REQ-7 are all addressed: a new DeathVerificationRequestPage with form fields, file validation, dark theme, and privacy callouts; in-app OTP generation with copy-to-clipboard and verification gate; confirmation card on submission; backend Motoko data types, stable storage, and submitDeathVerificationRequest function; admin-only backend query and update functions with RBAC; AdminDeathVerificationPage with table, SecurityBadge, and approve/reject buttons; and navigation links in Navbar and LandingPage with route registration in App.tsx. A minor concern is that the backend diff is truncated, so full verification of REQ-4 and REQ-5 details (activity log entries, admin-only enforcement) cannot be confirmed from the diff alone, but the frontend-file-summaries and hooks indicate the backend functions are present and wired up.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin 'Death Verifications' navigation link added to the Navbar for admin users, linking to '/admin/death-verification'
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-6 only requested a section in the admin dashboard, not necessarily a Navbar link. REQ-7 specified a public-facing link for unauthenticated users. An admin-specific Navbar link for the new page was not requested but was added.

hallucinated_features.description: Stats cards showing pending/approved/rejected request counts on AdminDeathVerificationPage
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-6 only specified a table with specific columns and approve/reject buttons. Stats summary cards were not requested.
